title: Mochi Ice Cream with Sweet Soy Sauce
description: A Japanese-inspired dessert featuring sweet ice cream wrapped in soft mochi and drizzled with treacle.
instructions: 1. Prepare the mochi according to the package instructions.
2. Scoop the sweet ice cream into small balls.
3. Wrap each ice cream ball in a piece of mochi.
4. Drizzle the treacle over the ice cream.
5. Drizzle the sweet soy sauce over the treacle.
